mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, channel_url, encrypted_api_key, priority, status, created_at, updated_at FROM promotion_channel ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, type, channel_url, encrypted_api_key, priority, status, created_at, updated_at FROM promotion_channel WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promotion_channel (id, name, type, channel_url, encrypted_api_key, priority, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.ChannelIdTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{type, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{channelUrl}, #{encryptedApiKey}, #{priority}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE promotion_channel SET name = #{name}, type = #{type, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, channel_url = #{channelUrl}, encrypted_api_key = #{encryptedApiKey}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.ChannelIdTypeHandler}
